hero.label: ✦ Federated fiction network
hero.subtitle: Suddenly is a federated network for tabletop RPG players. Publish your session reports, link your characters, and weave shared fictions across the Fediverse.

concept.label: The concept
concept.p1: You publish your session reports. The non-player characters you mention become anchor points that other players can claim, adopt or fork to weave connections between independent fictions.
concept.p2: The name "Suddenly" evokes that moment of the unexpected — when a character appears

links.title: Claim (retcon)
links.desc: "Your NPC was my PC all along."

links.title: Adopt (takeover)
links.desc: "Your NPC interests me — I'll make them my PC from now on."

links.title: Fork (derivation)
links.desc: "I'm creating a PC inspired by your NPC, but distinct."

items.title: Session reports
items.desc: Write and publish your game sessions, mention your characters, share your fiction with the community.

items.title: Character links
items.desc: Claim, Adopt, Fork — three ways to weave connections between independent fictions.

items.title: ActivityPub federation
items.desc: Connected to the Fediverse. Your characters can be followed from Mastodon or BookWyrm.

items.title: Multi-instance
items.desc: Choose your instance or self-host your own. Federation keeps everything connected.

instances.label: Instances
instances.title: Join an instance
instances.subtitle: Suddenly is decentralized. Each instance is independent but connected to others via ActivityPub.

contribute.label: Open Source
contribute.p: Suddenly is free software under the AGPL-3.0 license. You can contribute code, documentation, translations or report bugs.

header.label: ✦ Features
header.subtitle: Suddenly brings tabletop RPG players together around session reports, linked characters and ActivityPub federation.

publishing.title: Session
publishing.desc: Write and publish your game sessions. Mention your NPCs to make them visible and connectable by other players. Organize your sessions into campaigns.

characters.title: Living
characters.desc: Every mentioned character becomes an ActivityPub actor. They can be followed, linked or taken over by other players on any Suddenly instance.

federation.title: Connected to the
federation.desc: Suddenly uses ActivityPub to federate with other Suddenly instances and the wider Fediverse — Mastodon, BookWyrm and more.

items.name: Mastodon
items.desc: Follow characters from your Mastodon account

items.name: BookWyrm
items.desc: Link your stories to the literary works that inspire them

items.name: Suddenly
items.desc: Full federation between Suddenly instances

cta.label: ✦ Ready to start?
cta.title: Your first adventure awaits
cta.subtitle: Join a Suddenly instance and start sharing your session reports.

header.label: ✦ Instances
header.subtitle: Suddenly is decentralized. Each instance is managed independently, but all are connected via ActivityPub.

what.label: What is an instance?
what.title: A server, a community
what.p1: A Suddenly instance is a server that hosts accounts and session reports. You choose the instance that fits your community — or create your own.
what.p2: Regardless of which instance you choose, you'll be able to follow characters and read stories from all other instances.

items.title: Independent
items.desc: Each instance has its own rules and community.

items.title: Connected
items.desc: All instances are linked via ActivityPub.

items.title: Self-hostable
items.desc: Launch your own instance in minutes with Docker.

items.name: then.suddenly.social
items.description: The main and reference instance of the Suddenly network. Open to everyone, all languages welcome.

items.name: soudainement.fr
items.description: The French-speaking Suddenly instance. For players who prefer to write in French.

self_host.label: Host your own
self_host.title: Launch your instance
self_host.desc: Want to host your own instance for your group or community? It's easy with Docker.

header.label: ✦ Contribute
header.subtitle: Suddenly is free software. All contributions are welcome — code, documentation, translations, tests, design.

items.title: Code
items.desc: Fix bugs, add features. Python 3.12, Django 5, ActivityPub.

items.title: Documentation
items.desc: Improve technical docs or write user guides.

items.title: Translations
items.desc: Help translate Suddenly into your language.

items.title: Report bugs
items.desc: Test Suddenly and report any issues you encounter.

items.name: Python 3.12
items.desc: Main backend language

items.name: Django 5
items.desc: Web framework

items.name: PostgreSQL 16
items.desc: Database

items.name: Redis 7
items.desc: Cache & message queue

items.name: ActivityPub
items.desc: Federation protocol

items.name: Celery
items.desc: Async tasks

steps.title: Initialize the database
steps.code:
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec web python manage.py migrate
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec web python manage.py createsuperuser
